prose: The frontier-orbitals task on oxygen using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase and a multiplicity of 3 was successfully completed. The method used is B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`) in PySCF, with the SCF convergence achieved in 7 cycles. The computed HOMO-LUMO gap is approximately 5.28806 eV, with the HOMO energy at -8.87396 eV and the LUMO energy at -3.58590 eV. The total electronic energy is about -4092.2855 eV. Warnings: - Energy is finite. - SCF converged. - Header and headline data are present and valid. The result is trustworthy and computed.
